project_type: Fullstack app: Next.js 14 static export frontend + Azure Functions TypeScript API + ML notebooks
build_system: pnpm for both frontend/ and api/. Frontend uses next build with output: export (static site). API uses tsc to compile.
test_framework: None currently - Phase 2 adds Vitest with @testing-library/react
test_command: pnpm test:ci (in frontend/ directory - to be created)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build in frontend/ - should produce 16 static routes without errors. 2. After adding vitest, run pnpm test:ci in frontend/.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && pnpm install. No additional setup needed - uses static fallback data.
environment_constraints: Static export mode (output: export) means no server-side rendering, no API routes in Next.js. All pages must be statically renderable. Docker not available in this sandbox.
contribution_requirements: Build must pass (16 routes). Dark mode uses CSS variables approach to avoid touching every component file. Manual setup steps documented in docs/MANUAL_SETUP_NOTES.md.
key_patterns: Components use 'use client' directive. Tailwind with darkMode: class strategy. CSS variables defined in globals.css (:root and .dark). glass-card and glass utility classes. framer-motion for animations. lucide-react for icons. cn() utility for className merging.
directory_structure: Root: api/, docs/, frontend/, ml/, README.md. Frontend: app/(dashboard)/ has pages (overview, credit-scoring, etc.), components/dashboard/ has chart/card components, components/ui/ has utility components, lib/ has api client, utils, context providers.
